overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic library interior in a video game, featuring ornate stone arches, a large circular astrological rug, and warm lantern lighting. The camera moves smoothly through the space, passing bookshelves and approaching an exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular library hall with astrological rug

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular rug, observing the bookshelves and central table

entered.detail: large blue circular rug with gold celestial patterns and zodiac symbols
ornate round wooden table with curved legs
warm glowing oil lamp sitting on the table
floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves lining the stone walls
large gothic stone archway leading to the next chamber
white marble bust displayed in a wall alcove

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a grand gothic library with a large circular astrological rug dominating the floor. The camera moves around a central wooden table with a lit lamp, passing tall bookshelves and a marble bust while approaching a stone archway in the distance.

events.description: passing through the stone archway from the main hall into the narrower corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into the corridor with double doors visible at the far end

entered.detail: ornate iron wall-mounted lanterns with warm yellow glow
simple dark wooden bench against the left wall
twin wooden doors with pointed gothic arches and decorative glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the large stone archway, transitioning from the open library hall into a narrower corridor illuminated by wall sconces. The double doors at the end of the corridor come into view while the main hall elements fall behind.

events.description: slowing approach as reaching the exit doors at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward the double doors, preparing to exit the space

entered.detail: dark wooden cabinet with decorative items on top
long decorative fabric hanging between the two doors
ornate heraldic shield mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the exit, with the double arched doors growing larger in the frame. A wooden cabinet and heraldic shield become visible on the walls as the camera moves through the antechamber, ending at the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the expansive center of a gothic library into a narrow, secluded exit corridor. It begins by gliding across a large circular astrological rug and past a lit lamp on a central wooden table, moving beyond tall bookshelves and a marble bust toward a distant stone archway. As the camera passes through this arch, the open hall gives way to a narrower corridor illuminated by the warm glow of wall sconces. The scene then shifts into a small antechamber where a wooden cabinet and heraldic shield appear on the walls, before finally closing in on the double arched doors at the end of the path.
